# awscc_quicksight_o_auth_client_application (List Resource)

List all resources for `AWS::QuickSight::OAuthClientApplication` resource type.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "awscc_quicksight_o_auth_client_application" "example" {
  provider = awscc
}
```
